class.name: AbilitySystemEditorPlugin
class.brief_description: The main entry point for Editor integrations of the Ability System.
class.description: [AbilitySystemEditorPlugin] is the main Editor Plugin for the Ability System module. It automatically instantiates and registers the [AbilitySystemInspectorPlugin] so that nodes and resources like [AbilitySystemComponent] show customized tag selectors and unique name fields in the Godot Inspector. It also integrates the [AbilitySystemTagsPanel] directly into the Project Settings window for managing the global registry of tags.
